manifest.title: Connections: Static & Query Example
manifest.description: Focused E4-S1 example declaring both connection kinds at the document scope: a static inline data source (rows embedded in config) and an http (query) connection (endpoint + request shape). Connections are declared and validated against their connection-type schemas only — never dialed (no live fetch). The query connection references its credential indirectly via secretRefs rather than inlining it. Conforms to https://lattice.dev/schemas/dashboard/1.0.0.
manifest.author: Lattice
